title: lobelia excelsa
intro: Lobelia excelsa, also known as Khat or East Indian Lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lobelia excelsa include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Lobelia excelsa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is also used in traditional smoking blends, where it is believed to enhance mental clarity and focus.
